title: polypodium polycarpon var. obtusatum
intro: Polypodium polycarpon var. obtusatum, also known as the 'obtusatum' or 'cleft polypody', is a type of fern that belongs to the Polypodiaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Polypodium polycarpon var. obtusatum include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and potentially treating conditions such as bronchitis and fever. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
